text.tspan: contains HTML. For attachments, you must provide a FileUploadable
object with valid `s3key` (obtained from a previous file download
including PNG, JPG, PDF, MP4, etc. are supported. Gmail API limits
total message size to ~25 MB after base64 encoding.
